## Summary
Brief description of what this PR changes and why.

## Type of change
- [ ] New instrument driver
- [ ] New measurement sequence
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Utility / infrastructure improvement
- [ ] Documentation

## Testing
- [ ] `pytest tests/` passes locally
- [ ] Tested against hardware (list instrument and VISA address if applicable)

## Checklist
- [ ] VISA resource address stored as a module-level constant
- [ ] No hardcoded absolute paths inside functions
- [ ] `__main__` block present with sensible defaults (for driver/measurement files)
